summary: Seed analysis is still partial. Covered paths are tested against the pinned game, but results can diverge when generation reaches an incomplete or unverified path.

implemented: Loop and figure-eight builders, including connection-room placement
Pinned standard, special, and secret room-count tables
Pinned SecretLarderRoom minimum dimensions and food-placement viability
Depth-one lifecycle fixtures across ten seeds and replay fixtures for HKT-JZN-XQQ floors 6–8
remaining: Coverage is fixture-specific; unrecorded builder histories can still diverge
VaultLevel-only branches are not part of the regular-floor analyzer
Additional replay seeds are needed before deeper regions can be considered broadly verified
areas.impact: Room selection, bounds, connections, or downstream RNG can differ on uncovered generation paths.

implemented: Exact structured heap capture for Crypt, Pool, Runestone, MagicalFire, Traps, Sentry, Storage, and ToxicGas fixture paths
Full SecretMaze layout plus covered RotGarden, WeakFloor, DemonSpawner, Summoning, and ToxicGas paint behavior
Special and secret-room prize generation for supported room families
remaining: Legacy Room loot families beyond the fixture-backed Pool path still need fixture-first geometry and lifecycle parity
Other uncovered special or secret-room paint paths may retain legacy or fallback behavior
Some additive terrain, trap, blob, or entity facts are not verified outside their committed fixtures
areas.impact: Room terrain, prize positions, heap types, and later RNG may not match the game for an uncovered room family.

implemented: Forced drops, generator decks, main RegularLevel createItems drops, and supported special-room prizes
Item identities and exact heap capture on committed Java-oracle fixtures
Supported quest rewards and covered shop stock flows
Seed finder optional minimum item upgrade-level matching across the analyzed floor range
remaining: Loot tied to uncovered room paint or lifecycle paths can be incomplete or misplaced
Shop and crystal-room loot outside verified flows should be treated as approximate
Later-shop bag selection cannot be exact without player inventory and Hourglass sandbag input
areas.impact: An item can be missing, different, or placed on a different cell even when earlier seed facts match.

implemented: Source-ported RegularLevel ambient mob selection through floor 24
Depth-one mob lifecycle and HKT-JZN-XQQ floor 6–8 mob facts on committed fixtures
Ghost, Wandmaker, Blacksmith, and Imp selection and reward flows
remaining: Mob parity is not established for every deeper-floor generation history
Unsupported level types and uncovered room-specific entities can diverge
Correct mob tables alone do not prove full lifecycle or RNG parity
areas.impact: Mob classes, counts, positions, quest presence, or rewards can differ after an uncovered RNG boundary.

implemented: Water, grass, trap, door merge, and graph painting for supported regular-floor paths
Deterministic browser map baselines for CXG-FJT-BFQ floor 1 and HKT-JZN-XQQ floors 1, 6, and 8
Fixture-backed terrain and render facts for selected special rooms
remaining: ToxicGas vent and gas blob facts are not yet exported as exact additive render facts
Uncovered room painters can produce incomplete terrain or markers
Visual baselines cover a small deterministic seed and floor set
areas.impact: Map previews can omit or misplace terrain, traps, blobs, doors, entities, or room details.

implemented: Deterministic seeded generation needed by the regular-floor analyzer
remaining: The unseeded early Guidebook page is intentionally excluded
Player decisions and inventory changes are not inferred
Full parity claims remain blocked until the overall status is explicitly promoted from partial
areas.impact: These inputs or behaviors are not predictions and should not be interpreted as analyzer errors.
